name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentations that actually look like a human made them.
problem: Most AI presentation tools produce generic, visually bland slides that require heavy manual cleanup before they're usable. Chronicle 2.0 targets professionals who need polished, on-brand decks fast without sacrificing design quality or spending hours fighting template constraints.
useCases: Create investor pitch decks with consistent, professional design
Build client-facing reports and business reviews quickly
Produce internal team presentations without relying on a designer
Repurpose written content or documents into structured slide decks
